video_prompt: Generate a cinematic AAA game CG. The camera starts with a wide establishing shot from far away, then quickly pushes in to the front of the character. Next, the character charges up and throws a punch, striking a ship in the distance.

shots.description: Wide shot: straw hat pirate stands at the bow in a storm.
shots.image_prompt: Wide shot from far away. A straw hat pirate stands at a ship's bow, storm raging, lightning, dramatic cinematic lighting, AAA game render.

shots.description: Medium shot: pirate charges his rubber gear attack.
shots.image_prompt: Medium shot. The pirate's fist glows red, gear-second steam rising, dramatic lighting, particle effects, AAA game visual style.

shots.description: Close-up: massive punch shatters the enemy ship's mast.
shots.image_prompt: Close-up. A powerful glowing fist slams into a wooden ship mast, splinters exploding outward, shockwave ripples, slow motion, cinematic game CG.
